reason: While the three-to-four day workweek provides built-in days off and outpatient clinics lack on-call duties, technicians must work rotating Saturdays and major holidays. Predictability is generally high, but mandatory overtime from delayed treatments and extreme 3:00 AM start times require deliberate effort to maintain work-life boundaries. Consequently, practitioners report that long-term schedule sustainability is challenging, often treating the role as a temporary stepping stone.
